riskFloorReasons: safety-invariant proximity: src/monitoring/SessionReaper.ts matches session reaper

causalAutopsy.notes: The probe's projectDir:'' argument has been wrong since the probe was introduced — a standalone pre-existing bug. It went unhit because the reaper's earlier KEEP-guards (open-commitment, then active-process) short-circuited before the transcript check ever ran. The 2026-06-06 #955/#958 fixes peeled those layers so the reaper REACHED the transcript probe, surfacing the latent '' bug as a universal transcript-unresolved (0 reap-eligible in the post-deploy dry-run on echo v1.3.394). The transcripts always existed at the correct non-empty encoded path (echo: 151,814 files / 5.9GB); the probe simply never pointed there. Fix points it at config.projectDir. Operator directive: make the reaper work correctly and robustly.
